title: Reflex Ethical Choice
subtitlePlaying: Round {{current}}/{{total}}: Test your ethical decision-making reflexes!
readyHeader: Ready to Test Your Ethical Decision-Making Reflexes?
readyDescription: Answer questions about moral dilemmas and ethical choices.
readyTip: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!
ethicalSkills: You're developing strong ethical decision-making skills!

questions.question: What should you do if you find a wallet full of cash on the street?

options.text: Keep it since you found it
Try to find the owner or turn it in

questions.question: Your friend is cheating on a test. What's the ethical response?

options.text: Join in to not be left out
Encourage them to stop and be honest

questions.question: How should you treat a classmate who is different from you?
What should you do if you witness someone being bullied?

options.text: Stay silent to avoid getting involved
Support the victim and report the bullying
Join in to fit in with the crowd

questions.question: A store clerk gives you too much change by mistake. What should you do?
